programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Adventures of Young Indiana Jones Winds of Change
programme.desc: May 1919 Indy is in Paris working as a translator during the peace conference following the end of the Great War He meets up with TE Lawrence once more but finds his ideals have changed a lot since the start of the war Indy then decides to finally head home to Princeton even though it means having to face his father He gets reacquainted with his childhood friend Paul Robeson who becomes the subject of racism as they visit New York city

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A tormented young artist freaks when his latest cartoon The Phantom leaps from the page to do his bidding Meanwhile after undergoing a traumatic experience a claustrophobic is driven to the brink of madness

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A swindler Jack loves money and twins One day he meets rich twins that show interest in him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An aging puppeteer suspects his much younger wife has a lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A stressed out bank employee begins having premonitions concerning a serial killer who could be any one of the men in her life

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Sweet singer Miranda and her musician partner Sean are a couple of struggling songwriters who are trying desperately to break into the rock music business Miranda creates a sexy new image for herself in order to achieve the fame and success she desires However Miranda winds up paying an extremely heavy spiritual price because of said sexy image

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric confronts the werewolf Nicholas Remy and discovers that he is more formidable an opponent than Skorzeny ever was

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes to the aid of a blind woman with a talent for trick shooting he meets while working at a carnival when he learns that her fiancé plans on killing her for the insurance money

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A murderer who meets his victims through a dating service stalks Natalie and she learns of Nicks secret past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan suspects a news anchor of murder but the man has a solid alibi that makes it nearly impossible to prove he is the culprit

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers acts of kindness towards his new waitress friend is mistaken for romantic interest by her cruel Marine Sergeant boyfriend

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Grandma Pyle visits Gomer reads his fortune and predicts Gomer will cause something bad to happen; then Sergeant Carter loses his voice while yelling at him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Wrongway Feldman returns to the island not to rescue the castaways but to make the island his permanent home As a result the castaways try to trick him into returning to Hawaii and rescuing them

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E36
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E36

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E13
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E13

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max becomes a drunken jobless bum so that KAOS will recruit him

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Buildings are being blown up in Washington by paintings that include explosives

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: It was a dark and stormy night when BJ and the Bear drove two Transylvanian coffins from Frisco to LA meeting up along the way with murder mayhem and maybe even Count Dracula

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur lands in a Mexican jail and Mister Ed is the only crime witness that can help to set him free

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground Hogan causes a marital tiff which to fix requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When Hochstetter works to lower a French pilots resistance to interrogation Hogan brings the mans fiancee to camp to have Klink marry them

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale Molly and The 73 Crew must practice some trickery to keep Binghamton at bay while they arrange for an against-the-rules wedding for Christy and his fiancee - Lieutenant Gloria Winters

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Urulu puts a curse on Binghamton when Binghamton refuses to arrange for monetary compensation for damages inflicted on Urulus island by the Navys cannon boats

programme.title: Becket
programme.desc: King Henry II of England comes to terms with his affection for his close friend and confidant Thomas Becket who finds his true honor by observing Gods divine will rather than the Kings

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: Born to Win
programme.desc: A smart-mouthed junkie and loser known as JJ George Segal spends his days looking for just one more fix

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 221
programme.desc: Hercules 221

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A CVI malfunctions and kills a soon-to-be father The investigation leads Liam and Renee to a fertility clinic Renee finds out she is infertile and suspects that Taelon technology is affecting worldwide fertility

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens organise a series of armoured car heists in order to finance the purchase of rubies for their new laser weapons Meanwhile Ironhorse is kidnapped by the vengeful husband of a woman who had accidentally been shot dead by Ironhorse himself during a raid on a research installation that had been invaded by aliens

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A wealthy hunter stalks and wounds a rare hawk for a trophy Afterward the swamp takes Will into its confidence and Will sees the swamp as he never has before

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The body of a dead man leads Swamp Thing to Arcane and Gen Sunderland

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After destroying an asteroid on a collision course with the moon an even larger obstacle appears - an entire planet! On a recon mission John Koenig encounters an inhabitant who convinces him- on the basis of faith- that the moon and the planet must collide But no one else supports Koenigs stand

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked by Amarillo Ames to help drive his herd to Dodge City and take over if he dies but he doesnt want to tell the men or his daughter why Ames dies so Cheyenne is forced to take over by force as he overcomes multiple foes

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A college teacher is afraid that he will lose a professorship after being accidentally shot during a blackmail payoff

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is the new leader of the Impossible Missions Force with no explanation or even reference made about the departure of predecessor Dan Briggs First up for Phelps is a mission involving the drug trade Cresnik and Walters have cornered the heroin market and sell it at a handsome profit to gangs around the world Phelps devises an operation which will drive a wedge between the heroin dealers and their customers

programme.desc: A young concert violinist virtuoso begins to buckle under both the strain of performing and the demands of his authoritative manager Max himself a former violinist Kimble suspects he might resort to a desperate act to rid himself of Max

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Nightbreed
programme.desc: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity Meanwhile a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Laser Mission
programme.desc: Action superstar Brandon Lee portrays rebellious government agent Michael Gold who is sent on a desperate mission to a Soviet-controlled African nation in order to uncover a top-secret laser weapons operation and destroy it

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: Demons
programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mike Hernandez is here to take the Bantamweight title away from Jesse Arnett. Coming off of a 6 win streak, he is in the Hard Knocks cage for nothing else but the belt!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Chaleur Jones

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Mykel Shipman v. Roberto Lopez.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. David Swanson v. Matt Zemlak.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Vladimir Zenin v. Nick Aggalar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce pleads with Hercs former intergalactic commando leader General Zhest to help them fight Monster Minds The general is too afraid of Saw Boss and Jayce persuades Zhests son to join the fight Saw Boss poisons the water of the planet

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Saw Boss Audric is captured and one of many on board a slave ship Jayces root responds to Audrics and a disguised Jayce boards the slave ship in search of Audric Audrics friends mistakenly think Jayce is an enemy

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Miles Mayhem has gotten hold of Brian the Brain a super computer that controls a nuclear sub With it he demands full control of the Panamal Canal

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Bruce Sato encounters a man suffering from a fever in the Alaskan snow and is soon infected with the same mysterious disease Matt assembles MASK to find the cure

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap
